data.name: FillOutText
data.value: Fill out the form, we will respond as soon as possible.

data.name: ConsentText
data.value: I consent to the processing of my data for the purpose of processing the inquiry.

data.name: InvalidEmailError
data.value: Please enter a valid email address.

data.name: ConsentRequiredError
data.value: You must accept the data processing consent.

data.name: SubmitSuccess
data.value: Thank you. The form has been sent to Bitrix.

data.name: SubmitError
data.value: The form could not be sent. Please try again in a moment.

data.name: SubmitPartialError
data.value: The contact may have been created, but the deal could not be created. Check Bitrix before sending again.

data.name: Contact_CopyEurAriaLabel
data.value: Copy the EUR account number to clipboard

data.name: Contact_OgDescription
data.value: Do you have questions about rental management? Contact us! Check our address and bank details.

data.name: Contact_MetaKeywords
data.value: Contact Rentoom, Rentoom Toruń Office, Rental Management Contact, Rentoom invoice data

data.name: Contact_PageTitle
data.value: Contact - Rentoom | Rental Service and Management Office Toruń

data.name: Contact_CopyPlnAriaLabel
data.value: Copy the PLN account number to the clipboard

data.name: Contact_MetaDescription
data.value: Contact the Rentoom team in Toruń. Address details, bank account numbers (PLN/EUR) and a contact form. Professional rental service.
